sections.paragraph: an unused root, i.q. همس, همش, which are used of a gentle noise of various kinds (comp. הָמָה, הָמַל, הָמַן, הָמַר), as of persons walking, of small branches and twigs mixed together and breaking one another (Knicken des Reisholzes); compare transp. هشم to break any thing dry, as brushwood, هشيم brushwood. Hence-
